brand_identity.name: Divine Iris Student Growth Platform
brand_identity.philosophy: Zen Growth - Harmonizing academic rigor with spiritual and mental well-being.

headings.usage: Use for all major section headers, hero titles, and inspirational quotes.

body.usage: Use for all UI text, dashboard metrics, and long-form content.
body.weights: Regular (400) for text, Bold (700) for labels.

data.usage: Use for numeric data in charts and tables for precision.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6

glass_card.style: bg-white/60 dark:bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm rounded-2xl

zen_button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-500 to-purple-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium shadow-lg hover:shadow-indigo-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
zen_button.secondary: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-800 text-indigo-600 dark:text-indigo-400 border border-indigo-100 dark:border-zinc-700 rounded-full px-6 py-2 hover:bg-indigo-50 dark:hover:bg-zinc-700 transition-colors

input_fields.style: bg-white/50 dark:bg-zinc-900/50 border-gray-200 dark:border-zinc-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent transition-all outline-none

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle mesh gradients in backgrounds for 'Divine' feel.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-lg) for floating elements.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders with low opacity (10-20%) for structure.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

media.icons: Lucide React (Feather icons) - clean, thin strokes.

signup_to_dashboard.action: User arrives, sees 'Divine Iris' value prop.
User selects 'Path' (Student, Teacher) and sets initial goals.

signup_to_dashboard.component: Bento Grid with Radar Chart, Daily Wisdom, Task List

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle page transitions (fade-in, slide-up).
Ensure all text inside Glass Cards has sufficient contrast (use gray-800/900).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-900 or Indigo-950.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' strictly for the Dashboard layout.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
